start.title: Leather Under Snow
start.text: A strip of dark leather pokes from beneath a wind-packed drift. It looks like part of a traveler's pack.

dig.title: Old Supplies
dig.text: You claw away the snow and uncover a stiff, frozen pack. Most of it is ruined, but a few things inside might still be useful.

leave.title: Untouched
leave.text: You leave the pack where it lies. Whoever owned it is long past needing it.
